case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. THELMA GUADALUPE CABRERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, THELMA GUADALUPE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-28-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, THELMA GUADALUPE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, THELMA GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIELIST. DEFENDANT THELMA GUADALUPE CABRERA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABRERA, THELMA GUADALUPE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
